## Summary

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bot or Telegram command behavior
- [ ] Triage agent behavior

## Testing

- [ ] `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests`
- [ ] CLI demo checked with `python3 -m supportdesk_ai.demo`
- [ ] Telegram flow checked manually
- [ ] Docker Compose checked with `docker compose up --build`
